questionHtml:
What is the main interaction between liquid CH4 molecules?

A.  London (dispersion) forces

B.  Dipole–dipole forces

C.  Hydrogen bonding

D.  Covalent bonding

meta.title: What is the main interaction between liquid CH4 molecules? A. London (dispersion) forces B. Dipole–dipole forces C. Hydrogen bonding D. Covalent bonding
